Batch script to build Sphinx documentation, checking for Sphinx installation and setting paths.

# Purpose
This script is a command file used to automate the building of Sphinx documentation. It sets up the environment by defining the `SPHINXBUILD` variable, which defaults to `sphinx-build` if not already set. The script specifies the source directory (`SOURCEDIR`) and the build directory (`BUILDDIR`) for the documentation. It checks if the `sphinx-build` command is available and provides instructions for installing Sphinx if it is not found. The script executes the `sphinx-build` command with the specified options to generate the documentation, and it includes a help section that provides guidance on how to use the script.
